summary: A Fox News live remote interview with David Perdue, U.S. Ambassador to China, speaking in support of Trump's China trade policy, intercut with still photos of Trump and Xi. Frames show the split-screen news format with a 'LIVE' bug, lower-third chyrons ('TRUMP TOUTS NEW CHINA TRADE COMMITMENTS', 'TRUMP HIGHLIGHTS U.S.-CHINA COOPERATION'), and a Fox & Friends Weekend banner. It is a televised news interview.
notable_text: On-screen chyrons: 'TRUMP TOUTS NEW CHINA TRADE COMMITMENTS', 'TRUMP HIGHLIGHTS U.S.-CHINA COOPERATION', 'DAVID PERDUE | U.S. AMBASSADOR TO CHINA', 'FOX & FRIENDS WEEKEND', 'LIVE'.
